notes: Government of Quebec canonical portal. LégisQuébec (legisquebec.gouv.qc.ca) publishes the consolidated text of Quebec statutes via the Éditeur officiel du Québec.

match_nodes.description: Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Quebec)

data.official_name: Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector
data.description: Quebec's private-sector privacy law (CQLR c P-39.1), enacted 1993 and significantly modernized by Law 25 (Bill 64), adopted September 2021 with phased implementation through 2024.
